name: Salesforce
philosophy: Salesforce's marketing surface is the cloud-and-character brand — Cloud Blue (#00a1e0) as the chromatic anchor, the cast of cartoon characters (Astro, Codey, Cloudy) as illustrated heroes, and a friendly humanist sans (Salesforce Sans) running everything. The atmosphere is enterprise-but-approachable; the cartoon characters are deliberately disarming on an otherwise serious B2B CRM page.

design_language.motion_signature: Gentle scroll-triggered reveals; cartoon character mascots have idle animations (gentle float, blink) on landing pages. Hover lift on cards uses a soft 200ms ease-out with a slight scale (1.02).

trademark_signals: Salesforce Cloud Blue (#00a1e0) as the primary chromatic asset — used on CTAs, the cloud wordmark, and brand surfaces
Astro and the character cast — illustrated mascots that anchor the hero on every product page. The character voice is a key brand asset
Salesforce Sans — the proprietary friendly humanist sans, runs display through body
Pill-shaped buttons (`rounded.full`) on primary CTAs — the brand's signature CTA shape
Cloud iconography — every product is a 'cloud' (Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Marketing Cloud) and each has its own gradient-accented cloud illustration
ai_slop_avoided: Don't replace the character illustrations with generic stock 3D renders — the cast is part of the brand voice
Don't pair the Cloud Blue with a second saturated accent — the blue is the brand voltage
Don't square the pill CTAs — full-pill radius is the brand's CTA shape
Don't remove the cloud iconography from product naming — every product is a cloud
